title: Brunkards PVP
description: The definitive 1.21+ high-performance PvP suite: Zero lag, crystal-optimized, and pure focus utility.
body:
Brunkards PvP is a surgical, 1.21+ Fabric suite built for the modern combat meta. No bloat—just raw performance and essential utility.

🌟 🚀 Maximized FPS: Powered by Sodium, Lithium, and ImmediatelyFast.

🌟 💎 Crystal Optimized: Zero-latency placements and hit-tracking.

🌟 📊 Pro Utility: Built-in Totem Counters, Armor HUD, and Saturation overlays.

🌟👁️ Pure Clarity: Low fire, short swords, and reduced hurt-tilt for a clean FOV.

Stop lagging. Start winning. Get Brunkards.
